mapper.select: SELECT id, key_name AS keyName, value, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM settings WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, key_name AS keyName, value, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM settings WHERE key_name = #{keyName}
SELECT id, key_name AS keyName, value, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM settings ORDER BY key_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO settings (key_name, value) VALUES (#{keyName}, #{value}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = VALUES(value), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE settings SET value = #{value}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
